overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, futuristic architecture, and light pedestrian and vehicle traffic. The footage appears to be from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the urban environment of Night City with its characteristic holographic advertisements and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with multi-story parking structure

events.description: turns left from initial crosswalk onto street alongside parking garage
futuristic vehicle passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet street next to a parking garage, approaching an intersection with neon signs visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: green-tinted concrete parking structure with neon accents and 24h signage
rain-soaked road surface reflecting pink and blue neon lights
large vertical red neon sign with Asian characters and 'Silk Road' text

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a left turn onto a wet urban street lined with a multi-story parking garage on the left. The camera moves forward along the rain-slicked asphalt, passing under the glow of various neon signs while approaching a distant intersection marked by a prominent red 'Silk Road' billboard.

events.description: begins crossing the street at the yellow striped crosswalk
turns slightly right to align with sidewalk on the opposite side

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection among a group of pedestrians, navigating between waiting vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to pass
pedestrian in white outfit walking in the same direction across the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing painted on the road
red pedestrian signal box with illuminated yellow walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a busy intersection marked by bold yellow crosswalk stripes, moving among other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles wait nearby. The 'Silk Road' billboard shifts to the right as the camera advances toward the opposite sidewalk, leaving the parking garage behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts

events.description: steps onto covered sidewalk with overhanging roof structure providing shelter
passing by illuminated shop windows and futuristic vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk, passing various storefronts and glowing neon signs

entered.detail: overhanging glass and metal roof structure covering the walkway
various colorful neon signs including cyan and red illuminated shop fronts
futuristic information terminal with glowing blue interface

segments.scene_description: Moving under the shelter of a covered walkway, the camera progresses past vibrant neon storefronts and futuristic data terminals. The environment shifts from the open intersection to a more enclosed commercial corridor with reflective concrete underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown corridor with massive digital billboards

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street with larger digital billboards visible
slight turn to navigate around street furniture and barriers

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past large digital advertisements and futuristic street infrastructure

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the sidewalk in the foggy distance

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying 'BIG' text with glitch effects and colorful bars
elevated roadway or walkway crossing above the street ahead
tall building with illuminated blue windows rising into the hazy night sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wider downtown corridor dominated by massive digital billboards including one prominently displaying 'BIG'. The camera continues past futuristic street lights and beneath an overpass structure, with a glass office tower visible through the haze on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban district that transitions from a narrow side street into a sprawling downtown corridor. It begins with a left turn onto wet asphalt beside a multi-story parking garage, moving forward under the glow of neon signs toward a distant red Silk Road billboard. As the camera crosses a busy intersection marked by bold yellow stripes, the billboard shifts to the right and the open street gives way to the shelter of a covered walkway lined with vibrant storefronts and data terminals. The scene then expands as the camera exits the enclosure, moving beneath an overpass and past massive digital billboards, including one prominently displaying BIG. Finally, the perspective pushes deeper into the downtown haze, passing futuristic street lights with a glass office tower looming on the left.
